unresolved_policy.crosscheck_threshold_unchanged: Strictly greater than 98% of compared raw closes within 0.5%.
unresolved_policy.unresolved_handling: Preserve every Yahoo canonical row unchanged; preserve Sina raw evidence separately; set schema-compatible quality/provenance flags to UNRESOLVED; exclude the symbol from strategy qualification.
unresolved_policy.global_gate: More than 5 unresolved symbols is INPUT_BLOCKED; 5 or fewer may publish canonical data.
unresolved_policy.bounded_inspections: At most 3 exact conflict inspections total; no row deletion, fusion, threshold relaxation, member replacement, or pre-IPO fill.

frozen_inputs.universe: Exactly frozen current 50 companies and 50 selected stock lines plus SPY/XLG.

data_sources.canonical: Pinned GSD Yahoo chart explicit-period daily raw OHLCV and adjclose, 2015-01-01 through 2026-07-22.
data_sources.crosscheck_only: Pinned GSD Sina US daily K-line num=120.
data_sources.short_history: 20-59 Yahoo rows is preserved and flagged; fewer than 20 fails closed.

schema_compatible_marking.bars_conflict_flags_json: Exact status, common count, pass ratio, short_history, first_date, row_count, and conflict date/Yahoo close/Sina close/relative difference.
schema_compatible_marking.security_metadata: All 50 stock lines are stored; quality_status and description distinguish QUALIFIED versus UNRESOLVED.

central_data.writer: quant_system.data.writer.append_rows with existing lock and DuckDB transaction
central_data.publication: Acquire and validate all 52 Yahoo canonical histories first; isolated-copy append/replay-idempotency and deliberate same-key/different-value conflict rejection; exact backup; then one bounded two-table publication with no partial symbol loop writes.
central_data.postwrite: Exact receipt plus 50 metadata lines, 52 price symbols, row/date counts, unresolved count, duplicates, nonfinite, coverage, Yahoo hashes, DB identity/SHA, WAL and openers.

strategy_after_central_ready.input: Only stock lines with crosscheck_status QUALIFIED; UNRESOLVED excluded. Short-history additionally remains ineligible until t-252 exists.
strategy_after_central_ready.selection: Top10, hold through rank15, equal 10%, long-only, no leverage.
strategy_after_central_ready.benchmark: Same-date crosscheck-qualified current-Top50 equal weight; SPY/XLG diagnostic only.
strategy_after_central_ready.pass_gates: Base CAGR excess >1pp; Sharpe >= benchmark; MDD shortfall <=5pp; stress excess >0; turnover <=200%; at least two positive relative subperiods among 2016-2019, 2020-2022, 2023-latest.
